mapper.select: SELECT jr.*, s.submission_code, w.work_name, t.team_name, u.real_name AS judge_name, w.competition_id, w.track_id FROM judge_review jr LEFT JOIN submission s ON jr.submission_id = s.id LEFT JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN team t ON jr.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user u ON jr.judge_id = u.id WHERE jr.submission_id = #{submissionId} ORDER BY jr.create_time DESC

SELECT jr.*, s.submission_code, w.work_name, t.team_name, u.real_name AS judge_name, w.competition_id, w.track_id FROM judge_review jr LEFT JOIN submission s ON jr.submission_id = s.id LEFT JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN team t ON jr.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user u ON jr.judge_id = u.id WHERE jr.judge_id = #{judgeUserId} ORDER BY jr.create_time DESC

SELECT jr.*, s.submission_code, w.work_name, t.team_name, u.real_name AS judge_name, w.competition_id, w.track_id FROM judge_review jr LEFT JOIN submission s ON jr.submission_id = s.id LEFT JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN team t ON jr.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user u ON jr.judge_id = u.id WHERE jr.status = #{reviewStatus} ORDER BY jr.create_time DESC

SELECT jr.*, s.submission_code, w.work_name, t.team_name, u.real_name AS judge_name, w.competition_id, w.track_id FROM judge_review jr LEFT JOIN submission s ON jr.submission_id = s.id LEFT JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN team t ON jr.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user u ON jr.judge_id = u.id WHERE w.track_id = #{competitionTrackId} ORDER BY jr.create_time DESC

SELECT jr.*, s.submission_code, w.work_name, t.team_name, u.real_name AS judge_name, w.competition_id, w.track_id FROM judge_review jr LEFT JOIN submission s ON jr.submission_id = s.id LEFT JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN team t ON jr.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user u ON jr.judge_id = u.id WHERE w.competition_id = #{competitionId} ORDER BY jr.create_time DESC

SELECT jr.*, s.submission_code, w.work_name, t.team_name, u.real_name AS judge_name, w.competition_id, w.track_id FROM judge_review jr LEFT JOIN submission s ON jr.submission_id = s.id LEFT JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN team t ON jr.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user u ON jr.judge_id = u.id WHERE jr.submission_id = #{submissionId} AND jr.judge_id = #{judgeUserId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM judge_review WHERE judge_id = #{judgeUserId} AND status = 'DRAFT'
